title: Glorious Yeasty Middle Eastern Eggs Shakshuka
description: A yeasty and energizing middle eastern dish featuring dried mint and a soffritto base, served in an agave leaf vessel, halal friendly and in the form of shakshuka.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together yeast, salt, and a pinch of sugar.
Add the chopped onion, garlic, and bell pepper to the bowl and mix well.
Heat the olive oil in the agave leaf vessel over medium heat.
Add the soffritto mixture to the vessel and cook until the vegetables are softened.
Add the crushed tomato and dried mint to the vessel and stir well.
Make 6 wells in the mixture and crack an egg into each well.
Transfer the vessel to the preheated oven and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the vessel from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the shakshuka hot, garnished with additional dried mint if desired.
